languages.text: "Весть о смерти лорда Гапрак трагична, но отсутствие подкрепления... Возможно, ваше своевременное информирование предотвратило наше поражение. Мы поговорим о вашей награде, когда с этой войной будет покончено".

traits.locale_text: "Весть о смерти лорда Гапрак трагична, но отсутствие подкрепления... Возможно, ваше своевременное информирование предотвратило наше поражение. Мы поговорим о вашей награде, когда с этой войной будет покончено".

languages.text: "The news of the Gaprak lord's death is tragic, but the loss of those reinforcements... Perhaps your timely notification has forestalled our defeat. We will speak about your reward once this war is over."
languages.original_text: "Весть о смерти лорда Гапрак трагична, но отсутствие подкрепления... Возможно, ваше своевременное информирование предотвратило наше поражение. Мы поговорим о вашей награде, когда с этой войной будет покончено".

traits.locale_text: "The news of the Gaprak lord's death is tragic, but the loss of those reinforcements... Perhaps your timely notification has forestalled our defeat. We will speak about your reward once this war is over."

"The news of the Gaprak lord's death is tragic, but the loss of those reinforcements... Perhaps your timely notification has forestalled our defeat. We will speak about your reward once this war is over."

"The news of the Gaprak lord's death is tragic, but the loss of those reinforcements... Perhaps your timely notification has forestalled our defeat. We will speak about your reward once this war is over."

languages.text: "Die Kunde über den Tod des Gaprak-Lords ist traurig, aber der Verlust dieser Verstärkungen ... Vielleicht hat Eure rechtzeitige Warnung unsere Niederlage verhindert. Über Eure Belohnung unterhalten wir uns, sobald dieser Krieg vorbei ist."
languages.original_text: "The news of the Gaprak lord's death is tragic, but the loss of those reinforcements... Perhaps your timely notification has forestalled our defeat. We will speak about your reward once this war is over."

traits.locale_text: "Die Kunde über den Tod des Gaprak-Lords ist traurig, aber der Verlust dieser Verstärkungen ... Vielleicht hat Eure rechtzeitige Warnung unsere Niederlage verhindert. Über Eure Belohnung unterhalten wir uns, sobald dieser Krieg vorbei ist."

languages.text: “贾帕克大人去世的消息令人惋惜，但那批援军的折损……也许正因为你及时报信，我们才免于彻底失败。等战争结束，我们再论功行赏。”
languages.original_text: "The news of the Gaprak lord's death is tragic, but the loss of those reinforcements... Perhaps your timely notification has forestalled our defeat. We will speak about your reward once this war is over."

traits.locale_text: “贾帕克大人去世的消息令人惋惜，但那批援军的折损……也许正因为你及时报信，我们才免于彻底失败。等战争结束，我们再论功行赏。”

languages.text: « La mort du seigneur Gaprak est tragique, mais la perte des renforts... Vous êtes peut-être {mf|arrivé|arrivée} à temps pour nous épargner la défaite. Nous parlerons de votre récompense lorsque cette guerre sera terminée. »
languages.original_text: "The news of the Gaprak lord's death is tragic, but the loss of those reinforcements... Perhaps your timely notification has forestalled our defeat. We will speak about your reward once this war is over."

traits.locale_text: « La mort du seigneur Gaprak est tragique, mais la perte des renforts... Vous êtes peut-être {mf|arrivé|arrivée} à temps pour nous épargner la défaite. Nous parlerons de votre récompense lorsque cette guerre sera terminée. »

languages.text: «La muerte del señor de Gaprak es una tragedia, pero la pérdida de esos refuerzos... Es posible que su oportuna notificación haya prevenido nuestra derrota. Hablaremos de su recompensa cuando esta guerra toque a su fin».
languages.original_text: "The news of the Gaprak lord's death is tragic, but the loss of those reinforcements... Perhaps your timely notification has forestalled our defeat. We will speak about your reward once this war is over."

traits.locale_text: «La muerte del señor de Gaprak es una tragedia, pero la pérdida de esos refuerzos... Es posible que su oportuna notificación haya prevenido nuestra derrota. Hablaremos de su recompensa cuando esta guerra toque a su fin».

languages.text: "Gaprak lordunun ölüm haberi trajik olsa da takviyelerin kaybı... Belki de zamanında haber vermen yenilgimizi önledi. Bu savaş bittiğinde ödülünü konuşacağız."
languages.original_text: "The news of the Gaprak lord's death is tragic, but the loss of those reinforcements... Perhaps your timely notification has forestalled our defeat. We will speak about your reward once this war is over."

traits.locale_text: "Gaprak lordunun ölüm haberi trajik olsa da takviyelerin kaybı... Belki de zamanında haber vermen yenilgimizi önledi. Bu savaş bittiğinde ödülünü konuşacağız."

languages.text: 「ギャプラクの領主の死は悲劇的だが、その補給部隊の損失は... あなたの迅速な連絡が、私たちの敗北を阻止したのかもしれません。この戦争が終わったら、あなたの報酬について話し合います。」
languages.original_text: "The news of the Gaprak lord's death is tragic, but the loss of those reinforcements... Perhaps your timely notification has forestalled our defeat. We will speak about your reward once this war is over."

traits.locale_text: 「ギャプラクの領主の死は悲劇的だが、その補給部隊の損失は... あなたの迅速な連絡が、私たちの敗北を阻止したのかもしれません。この戦争が終わったら、あなたの報酬について話し合います。」
